creator: vehemens@verizon.net
text:
So do you want to reopen this PR, or should I submit a new PR?

>On Saturday 08 December 2007 05:02:11 pm linimon at freebsd.org wrote:
>> Synopsis: Add xf86-video-radeonhd to x11-drivers/xorg-drivers
>>
>> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
>> State-Changed-By: linimon
>> State-Changed-When: Sun Dec 9 01:01:57 UTC 2007
>> State-Changed-Why:
>> It has already been moved, thanks.
>>
>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=118494
>
>As Rene mentioned, it's not in the xorg-drivers Makefile video lists.  Here 
is 
>a suggested patch:

>--- Makefile.org        2007-10-10 00:55:56.000000000 -0700
>+++ Makefile    2007-12-08 19:21:57.000000000 -0800
>@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
> 
> PORTNAME=      xorg-drivers
> PORTVERSION=   7.3
>+PORTREVISION=  1
> CATEGORIES=    x11-drivers
> MASTER_SITES=  # none
> DISTFILES=     # none
>@@ -42,6 +43,7 @@
>                mga \
>                neomagic newport nsc \
>                openchrome \
>+               radeonhd \
>                rendition \
>                s3 s3virge savage siliconmotion sis \
>                tdfx tga trident tseng \
